issues.context: FINDING  Islet transplantation had a cumulative cost of $519,000, a cumulative effectiveness of 10.9 QALY, and an averag
FINDING  Islet transplantation had a cumulative cost of $519,000, a cumulative effectiveness of 10.9 QALY, and an averag
In sensitivity analyses, the need for one instead of two transplants during the first year did not affect the conclusion
